_meta.author: scorecard-refine-national autopilot
_meta.note: TX state-legislature batch SD30/31, HD31/32/33: evidence-finalize brent-hagenbuch, kevin-sparks, ryan-guillen, todd-ames-hunter, katrina-pierson. HARD votes/authored bills/issue-group ratings & endorsements; strictly party-line marquee votes (SB10 Senate 20-11) treated HARD on recorded side; freshmen scored from authored bills + cited self-statements/endorsements; unconfirmed individual roll-calls left null; Hunter fiscal-foe rating scored as a documented FALSE on deficit-spending.

brent-hagenbuch@TX.notes_set: TX SD-30 (Denton), Republican; won 2024, sworn Jan 14 2025 (first session, 89th Leg); term ends Jan 2029 (NOT up in 2026); eligibility challenge resolved in his favor. Texas Alliance for Life 100% pro-life (2025); coauthor SB33 (abortion-travel ban) and SB20 (criminalizing AI-generated CSAM). PRIMARY AUTHOR of SB2 (2025 ESA/school-choice) and SB17 (2025 foreign-land/farmland ban); coauthor SB8 (2025 mandatory sheriff 287(g) ICE cooperation). Voted YES SB10 (2025 Ten Commandments, confirmed twice via FastDemocracy). On-record 2A statement affirming constitutional carry and opposing federal encroachment. All 2021/2023 marquee bills predate his term. Researched 2026-06-19.

0.note: No documented man-woman marriage statement.

2.note: 2025 transgender bills passed near party-line but his individual Senate Journal vote not confirmed this pass.

3.note: Coauthor SB20 (2025) criminalizing AI-generated child sexual abuse material.

kevin-sparks@TX.notes_set: TX SD-31 (Midland/Permian Basin), Republican; in office since Jan 2023, second term ends Jan 2027, running for re-election 2026 (Trump-endorsed). Texas Right to Life 76 / career 82, TRTL PAC endorsement; voted YES SB959 (2023). Voted YES SB14 (2023 minor-transition ban), SB15 (women's sports), SB12/SB1601 (drag restrictions), SB2 (2025 voucher), SB10 (2025 Ten Commandments, party-line bloc), SB20/SB21 (2023 rogue-DA/judge removal), SB29 (2023 anti-mandate). PRIMARY AUTHOR SB17 (2025 foreign-land/farmland ban). Explicit statements: photo voter ID, border wall/anti-sanctuary, state sovereignty, 2A 'never compromise'; GOA endorsement (2022). TFR fiscal grade F (fiscal-hawk weighting, not a leftward deviation). Researched 2026-06-19.

ryan-guillen@TX.notes_set: TX HD-31 (South Texas), Republican since Nov 2021 party switch (was Rice's 'most conservative Democrat'); in office since 2003, running 2026 vs JJ Dominguez (D). Was the ONLY House Democrat to vote for SB8 (2021 Heartbeat Act). Texas Alliance for Life 97% (2025), TRTL 79. Voted YES SB14 (2023 minor-transition ban, confirmed both readings) and SB2 (2025 voucher). Joint author of HB1927 (2021 constitutional carry) + conference committee; NRA Defender of Freedom Award (2023), NRA/TSRA endorsed; voted AGAINST post-Uvalde rifle-age increase. Authored border-security HB7 (2023), chaired Homeland Security & Public Safety. Cited opposition to 'defund the police' as a reason for switching. Fiscal record weak by GOP standards (TFR 26/100). Researched 2026-06-19.

0.note: Voted YES SB2 (2025) ESA/school-choice (only GOP no-votes were Phelan/VanDeaver).

0.note: No documented position.

3.note: Recorded ABSENT on SB1 (2021); did not join the Democratic quorum break, but no recorded yes vote.

todd-ames-hunter@TX.notes_set: TX HD-32 (Corpus Christi/Nueces+Aransas), Republican; in office since 2009 (former Democrat 1989-97), Calendars Chair, running 2026. Texas Alliance for Life 100% (2025); TRTL fluctuates (81 2025 / 60 2019). Texas Values Action 87% (2025) — recorded supporting SB10 (Ten Commandments), SB11 (school prayer), SB12 (Parents' Bill of Rights), SB13 (harmful library books), SB8/HB229 (women's privacy/'What is a Woman'). Voted YES SB2 (2025 voucher). NRA A+/endorsed, TSRA-endorsed. DEVIATIONS: rated 'Fiscal Foe' (Texas Scorecard score 36, tied lowest-ranking Republican; TFR F 2013-2023) — documented FALSE on opposing deficit spending; voted PRESENT on HB1738 (sodomy-statute repeal), scored against the Texas Values position (flagged in notes, not scored). Premise that he authored HB1181 porn age-verification is FALSE (author = Matt Shaheen). Researched 2026-06-19.

katrina-pierson@TX.notes_set: TX HD-33 (Rockwall), Republican; first-term (89th Leg, sworn Jan 14 2025), former Trump 2016 national spokeswoman; defeated incumbent Justin Holland in 2024 GOP primary; up 2026. Texas Alliance for Life 86% (2025), TAL + Life PAC endorsed. Voted YES SB2 (2025 voucher); NO on HB1738 (retaining homosexual-conduct statute, Freedom Index conservative position); YES HB1056 (gold/silver legal tender) and HB796 (Texas Sovereignty Act); co-author HJR2 (ban death taxes); NO on HB2 (school-spending expansion) — fiscal-hawk. TFR 94 'Pro-Taxpayer.' Endorsed by NRA, GOA, Texas Gun Rights, Texas Metro Police Association, Texas Home School Coalition, Texas Family Project, Texans for Strong Borders; explicit statements opposing red-flag laws and on election security. SB14/constitutional carry predate her tenure (2023). Researched 2026-06-19.

No documented man-woman marriage statement.

0.note: Voted YES SB2 (2025 ESA/school-choice); endorsed by Texas Home School Coalition and Texas Family Project.
No documented public-profession vote.
